hero.headline: I Build Websites That Bring You Customers
hero.subheadline: Modern, fast, conversion-optimized websites for businesses that want to grow. Built with AI-powered precision in days, not weeks.

services.title: What I Build For You
services.subtitle: Every business is different. Every website should be too.
services.card1_desc: High-converting single pages that turn visitors into customers. Perfect for campaigns, product launches, or your main online presence.
services.card2_desc: Complete websites with multiple pages, contact forms, and everything your business needs to look professional and attract clients.
services.card3_desc: Custom tools, dashboards, and interactive applications. From booking systems to internal tools, built exactly for your needs.
services.card4_desc: Smart chatbots, automated content, AI-powered features. Give your business a technological edge that your competitors don't have.
services.cta: Every project starts with a free strategy call. No pressure, no obligations.

portfolio.title: Recent Work
portfolio.subtitle: Real projects, real results.
portfolio.project1_desc: Modern landing page for a fitness coach with booking integration and mobile-first design.
portfolio.project2_desc: Clean, fast website for a local service business. Optimized for Google and mobile users.

about.title: Why Work With Me?
about.p1: I'm Samuel, a 20-year-old developer from Germany who builds websites with AI-powered tools. This means I deliver in days what traditional agencies take weeks for, at a fraction of the cost.
about.p2: I don't just build pretty websites. I build websites that work, that load fast, that rank on Google, and that actually bring you customers.
about.trust2_desc: Built with the latest frameworks and AI tools
about.trust3_desc: Agency quality without the agency price tag
about.trust4_desc: I don't disappear after launch. Ongoing support included.

contact.title: Let's Build Something Great
contact.subtitle: Ready to take your business online? Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.message_placeholder: I need a website for my business...
contact.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

footer.tagline: Building the web of tomorrow, today.
